description: Percy PPTX scraping registry — enterprise decks collected for formatting analysis and percy feature-gap research

formatting_schema.description: Fields populated per scraped_file entry after analysis

fields.color_palette: array of hex strings extracted from theme
fields.has_animations: boolean — any slide transitions or object animations
fields.has_complex_charts: boolean — waterfall, funnel, combo, bubble, etc.
fields.has_embedded_excel: boolean — linked or embedded spreadsheet objects
fields.formatting_issues: array of strings describing problems Percy cannot yet replicate
fields.percy_compatibility_score: float 0-1 (filled by analysis script, 1 = fully replicated)
